title: beta vulgaris subsp. cicla
intro: Beta vulgaris subsp. cicla, also known as garden beet or leaf beet, is a sub-species of the beet plant that is cultivated for its edible leaves and roots. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. The health benefits of beta vulgaris subsp. cicla include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Beta vulgaris subsp. cicla can be prepared as herbal tea, juice, or dried leaf, and is also used in salads, soups, and other culinary dishes.
